name: A Little Italian Seasoning
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all the ingredients in a bowl of food processor.
2. Process until finely ground, about 30 seconds.
3. Transfer mixture to a tightly sealed container.
4. Label and date the container.
5. Store in a cool, dark place for up to 3 months.
6. Use this herb and spice mixture in pasta sauces or with braised or roasted vegetables.
